case_title: PAUL HUANG VS. RICHARD LEWIS et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, PAUL AS TO DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(I) CRC COURT FEES AND COSTS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC JURY FEES AND EXPENSES
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF 985.(J) CRC REPORTERS FEES
DEMAND FOR JURY FILED BY DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD
MEMO TO SET FOR JURY TRIAL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HUANG, PAUL SET FOR JURY TRIAL ON OCT-14-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206 NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL FILED
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR OCT-09-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 206
MINUTES FOR OCT-09-2003 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 206

SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WAS HELD . THE CASE WAS SETTLED. THE DEFENDANT SHALL VACATE THE PREMISES BY 10/31/03 AND PLAINTIFF SHALL PERMANENT RESTITUTION OF PREMISES AT 954 GEARY STREET #56, SAN FRANCISCO. THE DEFENDANT SHALL PAY $1866.60 TO PLAINTIFF IF HE FAILS TO VACATE BY 10/31/03. NO STAYS ON EVICTIONS AND THE RENTAL AGREEMENT IS FORFEITED AND VOID. THE $700 SECURITY DEPOSIT WILL BE PAID TO THE DEFENDANT PURSANT TO 1950.3. THE COURT TRIAL OF 10/14/03 WAS VACATED.(206 JPT JUNJI SUZUKI; CLERK: LINDA ESPY; REPORTER: LAVON GRANGER)
MASTER JURY CALENDAR SET FOR OCT-14-2003 VACATED AS CASE SETTLED ON 10/9/03 AT THE SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HUANG, PAUL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LEWIS, RICHARD THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 954 GEARY STREET #56, LEASE FORFEITED, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
